title: Billing & Entitlements Snapshot
description: Overview of tenant billing status, subscription tiers, entitlements, and payment state. The operator identifies past-due accounts, manages subscription changes, and triggers commercial lifecycle events (suspension for non-payment, reactivation after payment). Service domain: Commercial. Note: commercial suspension triggers tenant suspension in the Tenant Portfolio service per service-map §2.2.5. No VistA equivalent — platform-native commercial governance surface.

dataSources.description: Per-tenant billing overview: subscription tier, billing status (current/past-due/suspended/grace-period), last payment, next due, balance.
Per-tenant subscription detail: tier, entitlements, module entitlements, usage limits, payment history.
